## Type of Change

- [ ] 🚀 New feature

## Checklist
- [ ] I tested the change via CLI (`python filevault.py ...`)
- [ ] I tested the change via GUI (`python filevault_gui.py`)
- [ ] I tested the change via YAML config (`python filevault.py --config filevault.yaml`)
- [ ] Dry-run mode still works (`--dry-run`)
- [ ] Report files (JSON/CSV/HTML) are generated correctly
- [ ] I did not break the `run_job(cfg)` function signature
- [ ] I updated `README.md` if the change adds/modifies user-facing behavior
